backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features (3D boy character and Flappy Bird-style pipes) to their source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS with OKLCH-based design token variables for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Flappy Boy' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the full-screen Game component as the sole child.
frontend/src/components/BoyCharacter.tsx: React Three Fiber component rendering a 3D dark-skinned boy from Three.js primitives with flap arm animation triggered by the isFlapping prop and tilt rotation from the tilt prop.
frontend/src/components/Game.tsx: Main game component combining a 2D canvas for scrolling background and classic green Flappy Bird pipes with a React Three Fiber canvas overlay for the 3D boy character and a GameUI HTML overlay.
frontend/src/components/GameUI.tsx: HTML overlay component rendering the score HUD, start/game-over screens, and four street-art easter egg overlays triggered at score milestones 5, 10, 15, and 17.
frontend/src/data/negativeComments.ts: Exports an array of 20 negative comment strings and a helper that returns a random one for use as pipe obstacle text.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: Custom React hook managing all Flappy Bird game state including player physics, obstacle generation, scoring, and multiple score-triggered easter eggs using refs for the game loop.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, wrapping AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed since all game state is local.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file importing Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defining a warm street-art-inspired OKLCH color palette as CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, Bangers/Nunito font families, border radii, and keyframe animations for the game UI.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording version, feature history, known issues, and architectural notes for the Flappy Bird reskin project.
